meta.title: Tilt & Turn Doors | European Dual-Function System | DECA Windows
meta.description: European tilt & turn doors with dual opening modes — swing fully open or tilt for ventilation. Multi-point locking, exceptional thermal performance. Made in USA.

hero.title: Tilt & Turn Doors
hero.description: The European standard in door design. Dual-function hardware allows full swing opening for passage and tilt mode for secure ventilation — all with a single handle turn. Multi-point locking engages automatically.
hero.photoDescription: Фото: поворотно-откидная дверь DECA — демонстрация двух режимов открывания

howItWorks.title: Two Modes, One Handle
howItWorks.subtitle: The tilt & turn mechanism is the gold standard in European door design — simple, secure, and endlessly practical.

modes.title: Turn Mode — Full Swing
modes.description: Turn the handle 90° and the door swings fully open like a traditional door. Provides full passage width for people, furniture, and everyday use. Multi-point locks disengage automatically.
modes.photoDescription: Фото: дверь полностью открыта в поворотном режиме

modes.title: Tilt Mode — Secure Ventilation
modes.description: Turn the handle 180° and the door tilts inward from the top, creating a gap for fresh air while remaining securely locked at the sides and bottom. Perfect for ventilation without compromising security.
modes.photoDescription: Фото: дверь в откидном режиме — приоткрыта сверху для вентиляции

benefits.title: Why Choose Tilt & Turn Doors
benefits.subtitle: The smartest door system for modern living — combining convenience, security, and energy efficiency.

items.title: Dual Functionality
items.description: Full swing for passage, tilt for ventilation — no need for separate vents or windows near the door.

items.title: Multi-Point Security
items.description: Up to 12 locking points engage around the entire frame. RC2/RC3 security classes available for maximum protection.

items.title: Exceptional Insulation
items.description: Triple EPDM seals and multi-chamber profiles deliver U-values as low as 0.10 W/m²K — exceeding Passive House standards.

items.title: Draft-Free Ventilation
items.description: Tilt mode provides controlled airflow without direct drafts. Rain protection maintained even while ventilating.

items.title: Child Safety
items.description: In tilt position, the opening is too narrow for children to climb through — safe ventilation for homes with kids.

items.title: Easy Cleaning
items.description: Swing the door fully open for easy access to both sides of the glass — no need for ladders or special tools.

materials.title: Available in uPVC & Aluminium
materials.subtitle: Choose the material that best fits your project needs and aesthetic preferences.

items.title: uPVC Tilt & Turn Doors
items.description: Multi-chamber GEALAN profiles with steel reinforcement. Best thermal insulation values, zero maintenance, and the most affordable option.

items.title: Aluminium Tilt & Turn Doors
items.description: Slim aluminium profiles with thermal break technology. Maximum glass area, superior structural strength, and 200+ RAL color options.

specs.title: Technical Specifications
specs.profileImageAlt: Tilt & turn door profile cross-section showing multi-chamber design and sealing system

configurations.title: Door Configurations
configurations.subtitle: Single leaf, double leaf, and combinations with fixed panels — tailored to your opening.

items.name: Single Leaf
items.description: Standard single tilt & turn door. Ideal for balconies, patios, and side entrances.

items.name: Double Leaf (French Style)
items.description: Two tilt & turn leaves meeting in the center. Classic elegance with dual functionality.
items.photoDescription: Фото: двустворчатая поворотно-откидная дверь в стиле французских дверей

items.name: Door + Fixed Panel

items.photoDescription: Фото: поворотно-откидная дверь с фиксированной стеклянной панелью

items.name: Door + Transom
items.description: Tilt & turn door with fixed or opening transom above for extra height and ventilation.
items.photoDescription: Фото: поворотно-откидная дверь с фрамугой сверху

items.q: What is a tilt & turn door?
items.a: A tilt & turn door uses European hardware that allows two opening modes with a single handle: turn for full swing (like a normal door), or tilt for the top to open inward for ventilation while staying locked at the sides.
Extremely secure. Multi-point locking (up to 12 points) engages around the entire frame. Available in RC2 and RC3 security classes — RC3 resists over 10 minutes of forced entry attempts.

items.q: Can I use tilt & turn doors as my main entrance?
items.a: Yes, absolutely. Tilt & turn doors are commonly used as main entrances in European homes. They provide excellent security through multi-point locking and exceptional insulation for energy savings.

items.q: What's the difference between tilt & turn and French doors?
items.a: Tilt & turn doors offer the additional tilt mode for ventilation that French doors don't have. French doors are typically double-leaf for wide openings, while tilt & turn can be single or double leaf.

items.q: Are tilt & turn doors available in both uPVC and aluminium?
items.a: Yes. We manufacture tilt & turn doors in both uPVC (GEALAN profiles) and aluminium. uPVC offers better thermal values and lower cost; aluminium provides slimmer profiles and 200+ color options.

mainEntity.name: What is a tilt & turn door?

acceptedAnswer.text: A tilt & turn door uses European hardware allowing two opening modes: turn for full swing passage, or tilt for the top to open inward for ventilation while the door stays locked at the sides and bottom. This dual functionality is the standard in European homes.

mainEntity.name: How secure are tilt & turn doors?

acceptedAnswer.text: Extremely secure. DECA tilt & turn doors feature multi-point locking with up to 12 lock points engaging around the entire frame. Available in RC2 and RC3 security classes, with RC3 resisting over 10 minutes of forced entry attempts.

mainEntity.name: Can tilt & turn doors be used as a main entrance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Tilt & turn doors are commonly used as main entrances throughout Europe. They provide excellent security through multi-point locking and exceptional thermal insulation with U-values as low as 0.10 W/m²K.

mainEntity.name: Are tilt & turn doors available in uPVC and aluminium?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. DECA manufactures tilt & turn doors in both uPVC (GEALAN profiles) and aluminium. uPVC offers better thermal frame values and lower cost, while aluminium provides slimmer sightlines and 200+ RAL color options.
